account.title: Account
account.subtitle: Your profile and security.

rows.avatarBody: A friendly initials chip is used by default.
rows.name: Display name
rows.nameBody: Shown to people you share conversations with.
rows.emailBody: Used for sign-in and important notices.

securityRows.twoFactorBody: Use an authenticator app for an extra layer.
securityRows.sessionsBody: You're signed in here. We'd list other devices.

account.dangerBody: Permanent actions. We won't ask twice.

dangerRows.deleteBody: Removes your conversations, memories, and account. Irreversible.
dangerRows.dialogBody: This will permanently remove all your conversations, memories, and account data. In this build the action is mocked, but the flow is real.
dangerRows.queued: We've queued your account for deletion (mock).

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.subtitle: Tune the way Aurelia looks at you.
appearance.themeBody: Aurelia's dark mode is reimagined for warm graphite tones.
appearance.colorThemeBody: Pick the surface you want to live in.
appearance.accentColorBody: The clay accent used for primary actions and the focus ring.
appearance.densityBody: More breathing room or more on screen.
appearance.languageBody: Switch the interface language. Affects all surfaces.

models.title: Models
models.subtitle: Set defaults; switch any time inside a conversation.
models.defaultBody: Used when starting a new chat without picking a model.
models.responseLengthBody: Aurelia will lean toward this when there's a choice.
models.imageModelBody: Used when you ask the assistant to generate or edit an image.
models.imageNone: No image models available (ask an admin to configure one)
models.customBody: Aurelia reads this at the start of every conversation.
models.customPlaceholder: What should Aurelia know about you? How would you like it to respond? (Visible only to you.)

privacy.title: Privacy & data
privacy.subtitle: Your conversations are yours.
privacy.improveBody: Aurelia uses anonymized excerpts to improve. Off by default.
privacy.keepBody: When off, conversations are removed after 30 days.
privacy.memoryBody: Aurelia remembers facts you share to be useful in later conversations. Always editable.
privacy.exportAllBody: Get a JSON archive of all your conversations and memory.
privacy.clearAllBody: Permanently removes every conversation. Memory is not affected.
privacy.clearAllConfirmBody: This removes every conversation in your archive. We won't ask again.

shortcuts.title: Keyboard shortcuts
shortcuts.subtitle: A short list. The product is mostly keyboard-driven.

billing.title: Billing
billing.subtitle: Plans, usage, and invoices.
billing.paymentBody: No real card is stored in this build.
billing.invoicesBody: We'd show your last 12 invoices here.

pro.name: Pro
pro.blurb: For people who think for a living.

max.name: Max
max.blurb: For research, code, and long deliberation.
